_comment: Custom functions for the Retell LLM agent. Add each under Agent → Functions, with URL https://<your-host>/webhooks/retell. Retell POSTs {name, args, call} when the agent invokes one mid-call.

functions.name: request_appointment
functions.description: Log an appointment request after collecting name, patient status, callback number, reason, and preferred times. Staff confirms the actual slot when the office opens.

reason.description: e.g. cleaning, toothache, checkup, broken crown

preferred_times.description: two day/time preferences in the caller's words

functions.name: take_message
functions.description: Take a message for the team when the request is anything other than an appointment or emergency (billing, prices, insurance, clinical questions, Spanish follow-up, etc).

message.description: what the caller needs, in one or two sentences

functions.name: escalate_emergency
functions.description: Alert the on-call provider immediately for urgent dental issues (uncontrolled bleeding, swelling, knocked-out tooth, trauma, severe pain). Use AFTER telling 911-level cases to call 911.
